audience: 패션·리테일 트렌드에 관심 있는 일반 독자 + MD/바이어
source: KREAM 인기순 TOP 50 (남·여) · 2026-06-26 스냅샷 · insane-search 수집
disclaimer: KREAM 인기순 스냅샷 1회 기준 · 시장 전체 대표성 없음 · 투자·구매 권유 아님
style_lock: Monochrome black-and-white editorial fashion illustration with a single bold RED accent color used sparingly (only heart motifs and key accent objects are vivid red; everything else stays pure black-and-white). High-contrast studio lighting, fine paper-grain texture, minimal seamless backdrop, generous negative space. cards.title: 2026 반팔티 트렌드 총정리 7
cards.subtitle: KREAM 인기순 TOP 50 · 남자는 저지, 여자는 하트 — 숫자로 본 7가지
cards.image_prompt: Draw a 4:5 vertical card-news background. A clean symmetrical flat-lay: on the left a folded athletic soccer jersey, on the right a folded graphic t-shirt with a small vivid red heart motif, laid side by side on a seamless studio surface. Soft top-down light casting gentle shadows, fine paper-grain texture. Keep the upper third completely clean as empty negative space for a headline overlay. Monochrome black-and-white editorial fashion illustration with a single bold RED accent color used sparingly (only heart motifs and key accent objects are vivid red; everything else stays pure black-and-white). High-contrast studio lighting, fine paper-grain texture, minimal seamless backdrop, generous negative space. cards.title: ① 성별 취향

cards.title: ⑥ 볼륨의 성격

cards.key_message: 여성 인기순이 띄우는 상품군이 원래 거래·관심이 큰 스테디셀러 (성별 판매량 비교 아님)
